changes.fix: Increased wall tile gaps: scale 0.88→0.78/0.82, tilt Math.PI→Math.PI*0.92 for two-tone visibility
changes.result: Wall tiles now show visible individual separation and slight top-face reveal

changes.fix: Added bevel (0.03 thickness/size, 3 segments) to tile extrusion for rounded 3D edges; darkened side colors (0x6b4f2a/0x7a5830)
changes.result: Tiles have softer rounded edges; two-tone contrast is stronger

changes.fix: Darkened background from light golden #c4a87a to rich warm brown #7a5c30; darkened fog 0xc4a87a→0x7a5c30; darkened CSS body #9B7830→#6b4e28
changes.result: Background is now darker warm brown wood — closer to mockup's medium-dark wood grain

changes.fix: Lightened background from dark brown #7a5c30/#6b4e28 to warm medium wood #C4A882/#B89A6A; updated fog to 0xC4A882; updated all CSS gradient stops
changes.result: Background now matches mockup's warm medium wood tone — scene feels lighter, airier, Paper & Ink aesthetic intact

changes.fix: Wall tile scale 0.78/0.82→0.68/0.75 for wider gaps; face-down side color 0x6b4f2a→0x5a3f1a (darker brown); face-down face color 0xfff8ec→0xf5ead0 (warmer cream)
changes.result: Wall tiles now have clearly visible gaps between individual tiles; stronger two-tone contrast with darker sides and warmer cream tops; tiles stand out distinctly from table surface

changes.fix: Discard tile scale 1.10→1.35, spacing 0.58→0.65, rowSpacing 0.70→0.80 for better face artwork visibility
changes.result: Discard tiles in center are larger with better spacing; symbols should be more visible at camera distance

changes.fix: Wall tile tilt Math.PI*0.92→0.78 (more upright), sides 0x5a3f1a→0x4a3515 (darker), face 0xf5ead0→0xfff8ef (brighter), depth 0.28→0.35 (thicker)
changes.result: Wall tiles now show pronounced two-tone 3D block effect — bright cream top vs dark brown sides clearly visible from isometric camera. Tiles look like real mahjong blocks instead of flat slabs.

changes.fix: Table surface 0xf5ead0→0xe0c898 (golden parchment); inner overlay 0xf5eed6→0xdcc890 at 0.45 opacity; face-up sides 0x7a5830→0x5a3a18; face-down tops 0xfff8ef→0xffffff
changes.result: Table surface is now visibly warmer golden parchment, creating better contrast with bright white tile faces. Face-up tiles have deeper two-tone with darker sides.

changes.fix: Wall tile sides 0x4a3515→0xB8A894 (warm taupe); face-down face 0xffffff→0xF5F0E6 (warm ivory); scale (0.68,0.75,0.68)→(0.88,0.92,0.88) for minimal gaps
changes.result: Wall tiles now form continuous wall sections with hairline gaps — warm taupe sides match mockup's refined look. Two-tone is subtler but elegant. Walls look proper and cohesive.

changes.fix: Face-up tile sides 0x5a3a18→0x9C8468 (warm medium tan). Hand and discard tiles no longer have harsh near-black borders.
changes.result: All tiles now have consistent warm tan/brown sides — face-up tiles match the refined Paper & Ink aesthetic. Two-tone contrast is still clear (white face vs tan sides) but softer and more elegant.

changes.fix: Tile side colors darkened for stronger two-tone: faceDown 0xC8B8A0→0xA08860, faceUp 0xC0AC90→0x9C8060 (warm medium brown vs white/ivory faces)
changes.result: Tile two-tone contrast is more pronounced — sides are clearly darker warm brown against bright face tops. Closer to mockup's classic mahjong tile look.

changes.fix: Wall tile scale (0.88,0.92,0.88)→(0.78,0.85,0.78) for visible inter-tile gaps; layer vertical gap D+0.06→D+0.08 for stacked layer separation
changes.result: Each wall tile now reads as a distinct individual block with visible gaps between neighbors. Two stacked layers also show clear separation. Walls look like properly stacked mahjong tile bricks.

changes.fix: Stronger two-tone: faceDown sides 0x7A6A4A→0x5A4830 (richer dark brown), face 0xFAF6EE→0xFFFBF4 (brighter ivory); faceUp sides 0x8A7A5A→0x7A6848; side roughness 0.5→0.45 with 0.02 metalness
changes.result: All tiles now show stronger classic two-tone contrast — bright white/ivory faces against clearly darker warm brown sides. Slight metalness gives sides a subtle sheen. Consistent across wall, hand, and discard tiles.

changes.fix: Added bold ink-brush bamboo sprigs in 4 corners (scale 1.4-1.8, alpha 0.40-0.55) and 8 cloud scroll motifs (scale 2.4-3.5, alpha 0.25-0.35) drawn on table texture canvas via 2D API
changes.result: Table surface now features prominent traditional East Asian ink-wash bamboo and cloud artwork, matching the mockup's Paper & Ink aesthetic. Decorations are clearly visible from game camera distance.

notes: Round 14 — Added bold ink-brush bamboo sprigs (4 corners) and cloud scroll motifs (8 placements) to table surface. Table now has the Paper & Ink aesthetic matching mockup's decorative artwork. Next priorities: (1) fine-tune cloud/bamboo placement to avoid competing with game tiles, (2) shadow/depth polish, (3) final mockup comparison.
